2188130.name: RPGScenery - Mountain Village
2188130.description:
A lovely village hides in the valley surrounded by snowy mountains. Its walls and buildings were built from the stones of the surrounding hills. Outside the walls, humble wheat fields welcome travelers who wander in. The settlement consists of only a few paved squares, a few streets, and about three dozen houses. In the main square is the market and the shops and workshops of all the vendors, and a little further away there is also a small garrison.

This DLC contains 5 battlemaps to help you to bring your TTRPG session to the next level
